name: Rin Shibuya
description: **Height:** 165 cm **Hometown:** Tokyo, Japan Rin tends to be the “straight man” in joke sequences, and is sometimes overly serious to a comedic point. While she tends to be cool and harsh, she does have a sweet side that she occasionally shows others. She is self-conscious that her default expression comes off as unfriendly.
